name: Squat Nimbleness
description: You are uncommonly nimble for your race. Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20. Your walking speed increases by 5 feet. You gain proficiency in the Acrobatics or Athletics skill. You have advantage on Strength (Athletics) or Dexterity (Acrobatics) checks made to escape being grappled.
